Amended Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft Martin Eng To Provide Further Responses To Discovery And For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Cary S. Kletter, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Elizabeth Lee
Martin Eng, defendant and moving party in Propria Persona

After hearing, tentative ruling is modified.
Plaintiff Elizabeth Lee's motion to compel defendant Martin Eng to provide further response to discovery is off calendar as moot.
Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, enforcement of sanctions stayed for 120 days from date of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Amended Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft Dennis Yan To Provide Further Responses To Discovery And For Attorneys' Fees

Appearance:
Cary S. Kletter, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Elizabeth Lee
Dennis Yan, defendant and opposing party, in Propria Persona

After hearing, Plaintiff Elizabeth Lee's motion to compel defendant Dennis Yan to provide further response to discovery and for attorney's fees, is taken under submission. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Demurrer, Demurrer Of Deft To 1st Amended Complaint;
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cary Kletter of Kletter & Peretz (732.3777) for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DENNIS YAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to the 1st and 4th causes of action, sustained with leave to amend as to the 6th and 7th causes of action. Overruled as to remaining causes of action. Plaintiff has 10 days leave to amend. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/HEK/PB) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
